user.title: Sundance Spa (EW11/Elfin)
user.description:
Enter the connection details for your EW11/Elfin WiFi-to-RS485 adapter.

**Important:** The EW11 must be configured in TCP Server (transparent) mode, NOT Modbus mode.

data_description.host: The IP address of your EW11/Elfin adapter

error.cannot_connect:
Failed to connect to the spa. Check that:
1. The IP address is correct
2. The EW11 is in TCP Server mode (not Modbus)
3. The spa is powered on
4. Port 8899 is accessible
